name: libhtml-wikiconverter-tikiwiki-perl
title: libhtml-wikiconverter-tikiwiki-perl
summary: HTML to wiki markup converter - TikiWiki dialect
description:
HTML to wiki markup converter - TikiWiki dialect
HTML::WikiConverter is an HTML to wiki converter. It can convert HTML
source into a variety of wiki markups, called wiki "dialects".
.
HTML::WikiConverter::TikiWiki provides the TikiWiki dialect.
